label: FACIS SFTP — Scheduler
info:
Polls every SFTP_POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS (default 60s) and emits a tick to
the Poller tab. The repeat interval is read from the env var at deploy
time — change it via the chart `Secret/<release>-sftp-orce-env` and
redeploy the flow for the change to take effect.

A flow-context flag `poll_inflight` prevents tick pile-up if a slow SFTP
cycle is still in progress when the next tick fires.

name: tick guard (drop if in-flight)
